what_it_does: Vitest unit test for searchConversations that seeds a temporary SQLite database with one main-line and one sidechain exchange on the same topic, then verifies that text search includes sidechains by default and that the is_sidechain filter works in both directions.
observations: Uses mkdtempSync/rmSync to create and clean up a temp database directory.
Sets process.env.TEST_DB_PATH so initDatabase uses the temp DB.
Imports suppressConsole from a local test-utils module.
Defines insertExchangeRow helper that inserts a fully populated exchanges row with configurable id, isSidechain, topic, and archivePath.
Seeds two rows: main-1 (is_sidechain=0) and side-1 (is_sidechain=1), both about 'parallax'.
Three active assertions test default inclusion, is_sidechain:true only, and is_sidechain:false opt-in exclusion.
One vector search test is skipped with a comment explaining it is blocked by a 2560-dim vs 384-dim mismatch in a separate embedding migration lane.
Inline comments reference Wave-3 B-1, search.ts line numbers, and the removal of a hardcoded AND e.is_sidechain = 0 clause.
standouts: Deliberately tests the text path only to isolate the SQL filter from the broken vector/embedding pipeline.
Uses a skipped test as an explicit tracker for a cross-lane integration blocker instead of faking or asserting broken behavior.
Covers both the new default-inclusive behavior and the legacy opt-in exclusion filter.
conventions: Uses a typed opts object for the helper function.
Cleans up environment variable and temp directory in afterEach.
concerns: insertExchangeRow types db as any, losing type safety.
The helper hard-codes the exchanges schema columns, so table changes could break the test.
Vector search coverage is skipped, leaving a gap until the embedding dimension migration is resolved.
The test assumes initDatabase honors TEST_DB_PATH, which is not visible in this file.
notes: A focused regression test for the sidechain-inclusion filter change that intentionally bypasses the currently broken vector path caused by an unrelated embedding dimension migration.
questions: Does initDatabase read TEST_DB_PATH to select the database file?
Are all exchanges columns used by insertExchangeRow actually NOT NULL in the schema?
Could suppressConsole hide useful test diagnostics if a failure occurs?
What mechanism will re-enable the skipped vector test once the dimension mismatch is fixed?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to exercise the actual SQL filter change on the text path while isolating it from the embedding pipeline; the file does exactly that.
apparent_themes: Regression testing of search filter semantics.
Isolation of the unit under test from unstable cross-lane dependencies.
intention_signals: The file is trying to prove that removing the hardcoded sidechain exclusion makes sidechain exchanges searchable by default while preserving an opt-in main-line-only filter, and to avoid false negatives caused by the concurrent embedding dimension migration.
novelty: Uses a skipped test as a deliberate tracker for a cross-lane integration blocker rather than asserting broken behavior or mocking the embedding layer.
contribution: Provides a deterministic, file-local test fixture and assertions that verify default sidechain inclusion and the is_sidechain filter semantics for text search.
summary_for_embedding: Vitest test file that seeds a temporary SQLite database with main-line and sidechain exchanges and asserts that text search includes sidechains by default and respects explicit is_sidechain filters.
intention_for_embedding: To validate the Wave-3 B-1 fix that removed the hardcoded sidechain exclusion from search filters and made sidechain inclusion optional.

symbols.does: Helper that inserts a single exchange row into the exchanges table with a configurable sidechain flag, topic, and archive path.
symbols.description: Constructs and executes an INSERT statement for the exchanges table, supplying fixed values for project, timestamp, user/assistant messages, line numbers, harness, and session_id while allowing the caller to vary id, isSidechain, topic, and archivePath. It is used by the test suite to seed comparable main-line and sidechain records for the same topic.
